title: morisonia isthmensis
intro: Morisonia isthmensis, also known as the "Yellow Trumpet" or "Yellow Trumpet Creeper," is a species of flowering plant native to Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Morisonia isthmensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
